sl_bundle.subtitle: This set includes X products
sl_bundle.empty_included: Bundle — Add products via section blocks or product metafield custom.bundle_products.
sl_bundle.empty_related: Related bundles — Add products via custom.part_of_bundles or Related bundle blocks.
sl_bundle.empty_combined: No bundle data for this product. Add custom.bundle_products (products in this bundle) and/or custom.part_of_bundles (bundles that contain this product), or pass bundle_products / related_bundles into the snippet.
